resume.title: Resume
resume.description: PDF resume file used for job applications

credentials.title: Account Credentials
credentials.description: Used for creating accounts on external ATS platforms during applications. Stored locally in plaintext. Prefer using SSO (Sign in with LinkedIn/Google) when possible.

agent.title: Agent Settings
agent.maxFailuresDesc: Agent stops trying after this many consecutive failures on a single job.

telemetry.title: Privacy & Telemetry
telemetry.description: Help improve LangHire by sending anonymous usage data (feature usage, crash reports). No personal information or job data is transmitted.

blockedDomains.title: Blocked Domains
blockedDomains.description: Jobs on these domains will be automatically skipped.

plugins.title: Job Source Plugins
plugins.description: Manage job source plugins. Built-in plugins provide LinkedIn, Indeed, SEEK, Naukri, Reed, and StepStone. Import community plugins (.yaml files) for additional job sites.

language.title: Language
language.label: Interface Language
language.description: Choose the language for the application interface. Set to 'Auto' to match your selected country.
